calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-23-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

William F. Abbott, Esq., appearing for Cesar Macarilay Jr., Appellant/Defendant, who is also present with witness, his sister Myra Macarilay

William P,. Klein, Esq., appearing for Evangeline Macarilay, Respondent/Plaintiff, Who is also present with her mother as a witness

This matter came on regularly for a small claims appeal. The parties were sworn and both sides gave testimony on their own behalf. Oral and documentary evidence was presented. The Court took the matter under submission.

The court returned the doucments to both sides of the counsel after the hearing

Judge Pro Tem: Richard Grotch; Clerk: Leelay Chin; not reported (D. 525)
